ddls:
CREATE TABLE "floating_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each floating rate instrument */,
  "floater_label" TEXT /* Label indicating the type of floating rate (e.g., USD-LIBOR-3M) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the instrument */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., interest rate swap, floating rate note) */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Name of the issuer of the financial instrument */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Maturity date of the financial instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily performance entry */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the floating rate instrument */,
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market data */,
  "first_date" TEXT /* The first date of the performance record */,
  "second_date" TEXT /* The second date of the performance record */,
  "economic_indicator" TEXT /* Economic indicator(s) used to analyze the performance of the financial instrument */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scenario used to model the performance */,
  "previous_dv01" REAL /* Previous DV01 value */,
  "previous_forward_rate" REAL /* Previous forward rate value */,
  "spot_dv01" REAL /* Current DV01 value */,
  "spot_forward_rate" REAL /* Current forward rate value */,
  "1d_gross_pnl" REAL /* 1-Day Gross Profit and Loss */,
  "1d_market_pnl" REAL /* 1-Day Market Profit and Loss */,
  "1d_roll_down_pnl" REAL /* 1-Day Roll-down Profit and Loss */,
  "1d_accrual_pnl" REAL /* 1-Day Accrual Profit and Loss */,
  "1d_explained_pnl" REAL /* 1-Day Explained Profit and Loss */,
  "1d_unexplained_pnl" REAL /* 1-Day Unexplained Profit and Loss */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_performance_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_performance_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES floating_rates ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_performance_market_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_function" TEXT /* Job function of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "rate_label" TEXT /* Label of the rate being monitored */,
  "market_rate" REAL /* Current market rate for the floating-rate instrument */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last market rate update */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the market rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who conducted the trade */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the floating rate instrument involved */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_amount" REAL /* Amount of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade */,
  "settlement_date" TEXT /* Settlement date of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES floating_rates ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content or summary of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with the permission */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level defined for the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "feature" TEXT /* Feature or module that the user has access to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario */,
  "scenario_name" TEXT /* Name of the scenario */,
  "market_conditions" TEXT /* Description of the market conditions used in the scenario */,
  "economic_indicators" TEXT /* Economic indicators used in the scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenario_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scenario used to model the performance */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the floating rate instrument */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date of the result */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the result (e.g., PnL, DV01) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_results_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES floating_rates ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_results_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id")
)
